title: Unfinished Sympathy
meaning_summary: Unfinished Sympathy still earns because it remains one of the defining recordings of trip-hop and retains strong sync and catalog value.
revenue_drivers: Trip-hop canon status supports continuing catalog discovery.
Its orchestral scale and emotional clarity make it highly reusable in media contexts.
The song stays active through playlist and editorial placement.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from long-tail streaming, strong sync utility, and durable writer-side value.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
